name: Google Drive

hero.heading: Gapflow and Google Drive
hero.subheading: Automate file storage, sharing, and collaboration in Google's cloud

documentation.title: Getting Started with Google Drive
documentation.description: Connect Google Drive to Gapflow and learn how to automate file uploads, downloads, and folder organization.

documentation.title: Sharing & Permissions
documentation.description: Manage file and folder permissions programmatically with automated sharing links and access control.

documentation.title: Advanced File Operations
documentation.description: Master search, batch operations, file conversion, and metadata management for powerful Drive workflows.

tutorials.title: Automated Document Backup
tutorials.description: Build a comprehensive backup system that organizes files in Google Drive with automated folder structures and versioning.

tutorials.title: Team Collaboration System
tutorials.description: Create workflows for team document sharing with automatic permission management and real-time notifications.

tutorials.title: Document Processing Pipeline
tutorials.description: Set up automated document intake that processes uploads, extracts data, and organizes files intelligently in Drive.

faqs.question: How do I connect Google Drive?
faqs.answer: Sign in with your Google account and authorize Gapflow. Works with personal Gmail accounts and Google Workspace accounts.

faqs.question: Can I access shared drives?
faqs.answer: Yes! Access Shared Drives (formerly Team Drives) in Google Workspace. Perfect for team and organizational file management.

faqs.question: What file types are supported?
faqs.answer: All file types including Google Docs, Sheets, Slides, and native formats. Convert between Google and Microsoft formats.

faqs.question: How do sharing links work?
faqs.answer: Create shareable links with specific permissions (view/comment/edit), expiration dates, and optional password protection.

faqs.question: Can I search for files?
faqs.answer: Yes! Search by name, content, type, owner, modified date, and custom metadata. Build sophisticated file discovery workflows.

faqs.question: What about storage limits?
faqs.answer: 15GB free with Google account, unlimited with some Workspace plans. Monitor usage and implement cleanup policies as needed.

testimonials.quote: Automated backup to Google Drive protects all our critical files. Organization is perfect, recovery is instant.
testimonials.author: Jennifer Lee

testimonials.quote: Client file sharing is effortless. Upload, share, notify - all happens automatically with perfect permissions.
testimonials.author: David Martinez

testimonials.quote: Document processing handles 500+ files daily. Extract, analyze, organize - all automated through Drive.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: Team collaboration improved dramatically. Everyone has access to the right files with perfect organization.
testimonials.author: Michael Torres

limits.title: Storage Quota
limits.description: 15GB for free accounts, up to unlimited for Workspace. Monitor usage and implement archival strategies for large volumes.

limits.title: File Size Limits
limits.description: Individual files limited to 5TB. Google Docs, Sheets, and Slides have specific size limits. Use appropriate file types.

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: Google Drive API has per-user quotas. Implement batching and exponential backoff for high-volume operations.

limits.title: Sharing Limits
limits.description: Limits on concurrent editors and total shares per file. Plan collaboration strategies for high-traffic files.

relatedQuestions: Can I use OCR on images?
